verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before the foundation of the world You predestined me to see Out of a million people You chose me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes I walk in a wrong path But you showed me what is right Then you lift me up And you make me stand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He gives us courage To be the light of the world And gives us strength To fight the greatest battle Until we finish the race And wear the crown of victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God didn’t give us trial That goes beyond our standard Whenever we are weak You make us strong
